headline: All 64 dev briefs validated; train synthesis is next
summary: The complete dev artifact now has 64 unique source-matched briefs, exact schema and quotation grounding, and exactly 16 deterministic empty outlines. Its final SHA is 524c224a. All dev transport work and retries cost 0.190714 dollars; total provider spend is 0.230235 of 100 dollars. The preregistered 256-row train synthesis can now proceed under its 5 dollar cap, while GPU training remains closed until combined validation passes.

services.name: Sealed evaluator
services.detail: Private endpoint and hidden split ready

milestones.label: M0
milestones.detail: Data pipeline and GPU contract smoke test

milestones.label: M1
milestones.detail: Dev validated; train brief synthesis next

events.title: Full 64-row dev artifact validated
events.detail: Independent validation passed exact ID and source preservation, schema and types, verbatim quotation grounding, and 16-of-64 empty-outline assignment. Final brief SHA is 524c224a; all dev synthesis and recovery calls cost 0.190714 dollars.

events.title: One provider-policy row recovered safely
events.detail: GPT-5-mini consistently filtered one benign governing-board campaign page. A preregistered pinned Claude Haiku 4.5 fallback ran only for that missing row with a neutral non-persuasive prompt, passed the unchanged contract, and cost 0.001930 dollars.

events.title: Strict-schema dev synthesis resumed
events.detail: A one-record transport smoke independently passed source preservation, required types, non-empty outline, facts, and verbatim quotation grounding for 0.001711 dollars. The unsupported temperature field was removed and the original 64-record dev job is active as dftr-1784192598-f958d49d under its unchanged 2 dollar cap.

events.title: Malformed provider output contained and repaired
events.detail: Attempt 1 stopped after 10 of 12 records failed basic JSON transport, costing 0.069022 dollars; attempt 2 revealed an incompatible route constraint and was cancelled before billing. No malformed row entered training and the train gate stayed closed.

events.title: Real-data pilot source reproduced and frozen
events.detail: Attempts 3 and 4 each produced exactly 320 records with identical train SHA 3884fdf0, dev SHA 7012e7a8, and manifest SHA 6b264d07. Independent validation confirmed 256/64 counts, 320 unique domains, and zero overlap with all published exclusions at zero GPU/provider spend.

events.title: Recovery pipeline prepared through SFT admission
events.detail: The outage window was used to complete fail-closed brief validation, source/brief provenance checks, synthesis config generation, and a separate hash-bound 256/64 Qwen3-1.7B training path without weakening the original fixture contract. Combined data and experiment tests pass 31/31; no provider or GPU reservation exists.

events.title: Pilot source attempt stopped by Hugging Face outage
events.detail: The new constrained source job was accepted with exact published provenance and a zero-dollar reservation, then failed before selecting records when both local and Modal routes timed out against Hugging Face. No data source was substituted and no paid call occurred; retry cadence is lengthened until the official service status recovers.

events.title: Credential-safe real-data path deployed
events.detail: The gateway now supports preregistered, fully pinned FineWeb source materialization directly to the checkpoint volume without exposing the Hugging Face credential. All 16 infrastructure tests pass and the 320-document pilot excludes all 40 published M0/Tier-1 fingerprints and domains.

events.title: Full Tier-1 screen failed closed
events.detail: All 45 reports are complete and hash-valid, but no sampler passed every hard gate: human-calibrated no-collapse was 0/45 and unsupported-claim non-inferiority was 18/45. The preregistered freeze selected nothing. Provider spend is 0.039521 dollars and GPU commitment remains 0.683574 dollars; no scale-up is justified.

events.title: Independent Tier-1 human bank published
events.detail: A preregistered public FineWeb bank now provides 32 visible human documents from 32 domains, with zero overlap against every M0 train/dev fingerprint. Two complete materialization passes reproduced bank SHA ebcff5bc byte-for-byte; the hidden Tier-2 split remains sealed.

events.title: M1 boundary recovery started
events.detail: Sampler artifacts were recovered locally and the independent harness engineer is repairing external-bank precedence, calibration transfer validation, and baseline/freeze ordering without reading model outputs.

events.title: M1 hard boundary recorded
events.detail: Independent milestone verification at published tip a8482acb634317b57a591b3748fd85466d91390b returned score=fail and hard_boundary=yes. Completed SFT, sampler, and proposal-only calibration evidence are preserved, but no Tier 1 eval or sampler freeze was run because the legal human-reference and immutable baseline/freeze gates cannot be bypassed.

events.title: Sampler evidence published
events.detail: The completed sampler record is live at commit cae5270 with exactly one terminal ledger update and full source, revision, grid, seed, token, cost, and accelerator provenance.

events.title: Ninety-document sampler completed
events.detail: Run dftr-1784183624-2e567266 completed 45 cells and 90 documents with 26,618 generated tokens in 992.069 L40S-seconds for 0.645241 dollars.

events.title: Sampler prelaunch gate passed
events.detail: An independent audit verified the exact published revision, immutable inputs, fixed grid and seeds, loader fail-closed behavior, ledger cardinality, and budget before launch.

events.title: Sampler readiness audit started
events.detail: The published SFT pass is clean and the research lead is validating the exact three-checkpoint sampler configuration, reservation, and Tier 1 handoff before launch.

events.title: SFT provenance verified and published
events.detail: The attested checkpoint manifest passed independent validation for all three seeds, 474 training tokens per seed, and distinct adapter hashes. Resolution tip fb4439d is live on origin/agent/m1.

events.title: Three-seed SFT completed
events.detail: One L40S run produced three checkpoints for seeds 11, 29, and 47 in 36.292 accelerator-seconds for 0.023604 dollars.

events.title: M1 automatically resumed
events.detail: The operator published the exact research commit and the lead resumed at the preregistered 0.6B resolver smoke.

events.title: Sealed evaluator ready
events.detail: The private FineWeb hidden split finished bootstrapping and remains outside the research agent environment.

events.title: M1 Codex run started
events.detail: The approved milestone is live on gpt-5.6-sol with high reasoning and fast service.

events.title: Sealed bootstrap optimized
events.detail: The private loader now streams the target-year FineWeb crawl configurations directly instead of scanning from 2013.

events.title: M0 approved and merged
events.detail: The passing M0 branch is on main and the M1 isolation branch is active.

events.title: M0 parked for sign-off
events.detail: Candidate 2 passed independent offline verification with Tier 1 unchanged; the research lead stopped at the milestone boundary.

events.title: Accounting defect corrected
events.detail: Candidate 1 omitted complete terminal accounting. Candidate 2 fixed status, time, accelerator seconds, tokens, and cost fields.

events.title: M0 Codex run started
events.detail: gpt-5.6-sol is live with high reasoning and fast service in an isolated capability-only environment.

events.title: Setup merged
events.detail: The reviewed research infrastructure is now on main; the isolated M0 branch is ready.

events.title: Sealed endpoint deployed
events.detail: The private 7B independent evaluator is online and its hidden test split is being initialized.

events.title: GPU gateway verified
events.detail: Authenticated budget and judge calls passed with the 40 dollar Modal cap enforced.

events.title: Sealed evaluator building
events.detail: The private independent embedder image is installing and will be bootstrapped after deployment.

events.title: Reaper deployed
events.detail: The independent five-minute budget and wall-clock enforcement job is online.

events.title: Deployment started
events.detail: Provider secret detected and service bindings prepared.

events.title: Operator secrets secured
events.detail: Capability tokens and sealed configuration stored in Modal and macOS Keychain.

events.title: Storage created
events.detail: Gateway state, checkpoints, sealed state, and sealed artifacts volumes are online.

events.title: Engineering checks passed
events.detail: Harness, infrastructure, and private evaluator suites are green.

next_action: Launch the exact preregistered 256-row train brief synthesis under its 5 dollar provider cap, preserve and resume only validated rows if needed, then require combined 256/64 validation before any GPU training.
